chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-855 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 03.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that firstly, the petitioner will approach before the proper forum by filing application and if his grievance would not be resolved, he will approach before the Court. Accordingly, under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
